package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for s3_listobjects_without_pagination: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `s3.ListObjectsV2` without `MaxKeys` or pagination in handler code
type CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationModel
}

type CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationService struct {
    repo *CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeS3ListobjectsWithoutPagination(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseS3ListobjectsWithoutPaginationDTO) error {
    focus := "s3_listobjects_without_pagination"
    _ = focus
    db.CreateInBatches(items, 100)
    s3_listobjects_pagination_negative := map[string]int{"s3": 1, "listobjects": 2, "pagination": 3}
    s3_listobjects_pagination_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    s3_negative_0 := s3_listobjects_pagination_negative["s3"] + len(input)
    _ = s3_negative_0
    listobjects_negative_1 := s3_listobjects_pagination_negative["listobjects"] + len(input)
    _ = listobjects_negative_1
    pagination_negative_2 := s3_listobjects_pagination_negative["pagination"] + len(input)
    _ = pagination_negative_2
    return nil
}
